theme_and_archetype.rationale: The user explicitly requested a glowing blue neon / arcade aesthetic theme with a deep dark backdrop. The design avoids all purple gradients and relies strictly on high-contrast neon cyan/blue hues against void black to create a premium 3D strategy game feel.

rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter font-bold uppercase text-white drop-shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,240,255,0.4)]
rules.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight font-semibold uppercase text-white

general.spacing_scale: Use generous padding (p-6, p-8) for dashboard cards to avoid cramping text.
general.page_wrapper: min-h-screen bg-[#05050A] text-white flex flex-col overflow-x-hidden selection:bg-[#00F0FF]/30

game_screen.structure: Full-bleed absolute relative container for the Three.js canvas. Overlaid with absolute positioned HUD panels (z-50) using pointer-events-none for wrapper and pointer-events-auto for interactive elements.
game_screen.hud_panels: Top-left for Scores/Players, Top-right for Menus/Reset/Controls, Bottom-center for Turn Indicator & Move History.

dashboard_profile.grid: Bento Grid style ('Control Room Grid'). grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6.
dashboard_profile.cards: Dark, flat surfaces with 1px border (`border-[#00F0FF]/20`). Avoid heavy shadows; use a subtle inset glow or drop-shadow.

hud_glassmorphism.classes: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#05050A]/60 border border-[#00F0FF]/20 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,240,255,0.05)] rounded-lg
hud_glassmorphism.usage: In-game overlays, turn indicators, mini-menus, and floating modals.

buttons.primary: bg-transparent border border-[#00F0FF] text-[#00F0FF] hover:bg-[#00F0FF]/10 hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,240,255,0.4)] transition-all duration-300 rounded uppercase tracking-wider px-6 py-3 font-bold
buttons.ghost: text-slate-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors rounded px-4 py-2

components.tables: Shadcn tables with custom dark colors. Minimal row borders. Table header text should be cyan (`text-[#00F0FF]`).
components.forms: Shadcn form elements customized for dark mode. Inputs have transparent backgrounds, subtle borders, and neon glow on focus (`focus:ring-[#00F0FF]/40`).
components.tabs: Shadcn tabs. Active states highlighted with cyan color and subtle text shadow, overriding the default white background.

3d_rules.environment: Use ambient lighting and point lights in R3F to create depth. No flat lighting. Ensure materials reflect light.
3d_rules.board_materials: Use a transparent/glass-like MeshPhysicalMaterial for the cube grid to allow visibility of inner cells (transmission, opacity).
3d_rules.win_glow: Utilize @react-three/postprocessing (Bloom pass) to make the winning line and placed pieces (X, O, Triangle) physically glow in 3D space.
3d_rules.animations: Use smooth Lerping for the camera 'reset view' and 'exploded view' layer separation. Hover ghost previews should have opacity: 0.3.

motion.hover: Interactive UI elements must transition smoothly (background, border, box-shadow).
motion.transitions: Use Framer Motion for page transitions and staggering list elements (e.g., leaderboard rows, history items).

hero_background.description: Abstract dark blue glowing geometry, to be used behind the lobby/menu screens with low opacity as a massive atmospheric texture.

dashboard_texture.description: Dark weathered metal texture. Apply heavily reduced opacity (e.g., 5-10%) via absolute positioning to give depth to profile pages.

avatar_1.description: Gamer portrait for dummy player profiles in the UI.

avatar_2.description: Secondary gamer portrait for local multiplayer previews.

testing.attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (kebab-case, role-based, e.g., `data-testid='start-game-btn'`).

instructions_to_main_agent: Install Three.js, @react-three/fiber, @react-three/drei, and @react-three/postprocessing for the 3D board rendering and bloom/glow effects.
Install custom fonts via Google Fonts: Outfit, IBM Plex Mono, and Orbitron.
Implement the UI using pure Tailwind CSS with deep dark colors. Strictly avoid any purples (#9D4CDD) as explicitly requested by the user.
The 3D canvas must have drag-rotate and scroll-zoom. Add HUD controls to trigger a 'reset view' camera lerp and a toggle for 'exploded view'.
Player marks must be distinctly colored: P1=Cyan (#00F0FF, X), P2=Orange (#FF5500, O), P3=Green (#00FF66, ▲).
Construct the Profile and Leaderboard pages utilizing the Bento Grid layout structure mapped out in layout_and_spacing.
Auth can use dummy states initially, but ensure the routing securely isolates guest vs authenticated views.
Never use generic placeholder images; rely strictly on the media URLs provided in this file.
